Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that include rejections by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and activity Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR for cases where activity Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR occurs

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in looping variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR after the execution of Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR after a prior approval step (e.g., Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Total time for Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR compared to the total time for Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in similar process paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that end without payment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR and the subsequent Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time from Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR to the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in retry loops
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants involving multiple rejections
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and activity Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR for cases where activity Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR occurs

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR versus time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR compared to elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time to Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR grouped by org:resource performing the rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR' and the end of case grouped by the last value of org:resource

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR in variants that later result in successful payment versus those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR measured from the start of the case until the rejection event
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Average time between Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by SUPERVISOR'
